stemHtml: When shall an aircraft in the heavy-wake-turbulence category include the word "Heavy" immediately after its call sign e.g. Fastair 345 heavy?

options.a: In the initial call to the aerodrome control tower and the approach control unit.
options.c: It can be avoided because it is visible on the flight plan.
options.d: In all calls to the aerodrome tower and the approach control unit.
